articles.title: Understanding Marketing Mix Modeling
articles.abstract: A comprehensive guide to how Sol Analytics uses statistical analysis to estimate the impact of various marketing tactics on sales and then forecast the impact of future sets of tactics.
articles.content:
Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) is a statistical analysis technique used to estimate the impact of various marketing tactics on sales and then forecast the impact of future sets of tactics. It is often used to optimize the advertising mix and promotional tactics with respect to sales revenue or profit.

Key Components

Effective MMM relies on decomposing sales volume into two primary sources:

  • Base Sales: Sales that occur naturally without any advertising stimulation. This is driven by brand equity, seasonality, and distribution.
  • Incremental Sales: Sales driven by marketing activities like TV ads, digital campaigns, and promotions.

articles.title: Paving the Way for Insights & Intelligence
articles.abstract: Learn about Sol Analytics, a leading consulting company focused on Research, Marketing Analytics, and Digital Transformation.
articles.content:
Sol Analytics is a premier consulting firm dedicated to empowering organizations through data-driven decision-making. We focus on three core pillars: Insights, Intelligence, and Infrastructure.

Core Pillars

  • Insights: Building a Single Version of Truth (SVOT) to enable confident, fact-based choices.
  • Intelligence: Leveraging Predictive and Prescriptive Analytics for strategic foresight and agility.
  • Infrastructure: Establishing robust data platforms, warehouses, and cloud migration services.

Our Expertise

We combine deep knowledge in Consulting, Technology, and Data Science to uncover hidden facts and unlock boundless possibilities for business growth.
